allow:
Bash(ruby -e '
require ""xcodeproj""

project_path = ""GoodWatch.xcodeproj""
project = Xcodeproj::Project.open(project_path)

# Find the main target
target = project.targets.first

# Find or create Config group under App
app_group = project.main_group.find_subpath(""GoodWatch/App"", true)
config_group = app_group.find_subpath(""Config"", false) || app_group.new_group(""Config"")

# Add SupabaseConfig.swift
config_file_path = ""App/Config/SupabaseConfig.swift""
file_ref = config_group.new_file(config_file_path)
target.source_build_phase.add_file_reference(file_ref)

project.save
puts ""Added SupabaseConfig.swift to project""
')
